title: West Mosul — The Old City
introText:
April 2017. The old city is mostly bricks now.
You drove a French team in last week. They were yours all morning.
This one is alone. American. Doesn't speak Arabic. You don't know him.
Two camera cases. A satellite phone. Body armour he hasn't worn yet.
Engine on at 04:47. The streets are still empty.

beats.text:
The Hilux took a JDAM in March. Two were inside.
Coalition said they had clearance.

endings.text:
You drop him at the Divan. He flies to London Friday.
The piece runs in three weeks. Six pages.
You drive home to Ankawa.
The phone rings at 02:00 on Sunday. Another one is in tonight.

She doesn't get interviewed.
Someone else, somewhere else, eventually does.
The world will catch up to her in its own time.
